prompt: Photorealistic matte black Mercedes Sprinter van parked at an Adelaide construction site. The elevation lines logo spans the full length of the side panel in landscape format — two long parallel horizontal gold lines running the length of the van body with small perpendicular tick marks at each endpoint, the large letters LK in clean geometric sans-serif medium weight centred between the two horizontal lines, a thin dashed vertical centreline through the composition centre, and DESIGN AND BUILD in thin tracked capitals below the lower horizontal line. All graphics in warm gold #C9A96E on the matte black van body. The wide horizontal format of the logo perfectly suits the long van panel. 35mm f/4 lens, construction scaffolding and site hoarding in background, overcast Adelaide sky, cinematic colour grading, professional commercial vehicle photography.
